description: Enterprise-grade User Management System implementing Clean Architecture (Hexagonal) and SOLID principles in NestJS and React following the corporate bMAD Method.
rules: Always protect the Domain Kernel by keeping it free of framework, DB, or external library dependencies.
Ensure every architectural change aligns with approved ADRs (Architectural Decision Records) in docs/03-adrs.
Adhere strictly to explicit TypeScript interfaces and SonarJS static code thresholds.
Prefer the functional Result Pattern over throwing application exceptions for domain errors.
Consult the corporate authoritative tech stack prior to introducing new third-party packages.
